item.title: AI config inference (--smart)
item.intent: clawhq init --smart must infer the right blueprint and integrations from natural language, fully local via Ollama. No data leaves the machine.
item.description: DELIGHT PATH: 'clawhq init --smart' is the < 5 minute path. Users describe what they need, Ollama infers blueprint + integrations. Local Ollama means zero data leaves. This is the product's wow moment. Correctly positioned as should — guided wizard (CQ-010) must work first as the fallback path. Acceptance: natural language description maps to correct blueprint; integration suggestions accurate; result produces same output as guided wizard; works fully locally with Ollama.
steps: Implement natural language to blueprint inference via local Ollama
Map user description to blueprint selection + integration suggestions
Ensure inference result matches guided wizard output format
acceptanceCriteria: Natural language description maps to correct blueprint
Integration suggestions are accurate for described use case
Result produces same output format as guided wizard
Works fully locally with Ollama — no data leaves machine
